name: Krungdhep Sophon Public Company Limited
summary: Krungdhep Sophon Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in developing and leasing of real estate properties in Thailand. The company also engages in the warehouse and wharf business that offers space renting and port of loading/unloading goods services to retail customers. In addition, it provides management consulting, document storage and data management, document management, and computer back-up media storage services, as well as electronic management services. The company was formerly known as Krungdhep Warehouse Company Limited and changed its name to Krungdhep Sophon Public Company Limited in December 1995. Krungdhep Sophon Public Company Limited was founded in 1961 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
